channel.title: Codex on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Codex on Junho Lee

item.title: Building a Cost-Effective AI Agent Workspace with Codex
item.description: Connect a MacBook and smartphone using Codex for thirty dollars a month to build a highly practical agent environment and automate daily engineering tasks.

item.title: Building Cross-Validation Systems with Claude Code and Codex
item.description: A dual-agent strategy separating author and reviewer roles to eliminate code blind spots and improve developer productivity.
